methodology.description: OpenRouter free routing chooses the final country attribution and canonical threat category for each headline.

regional_summary_6h.headline: Iran escalates with cross-border strikes, Gulf disruptions, and evacuations via Armenia
bullets: Iranian missile strikes damaged Israeli civilian areas and disrupted a Saudi-Bahrain bridge and petrochemical facility, showing active cross-border warfare.
Over 500 Russian citizens, including Bushehr NPP employees, evacuated from Iran through Armenia, straining border security and indicating severe civilian stress.
Georgia's opposition formed a new political alliance, raising instability risks on Turkiye's northeastern border amid regional volatility.
regional_summary_6h.watch: Watch for further Iranian cross-border attacks or Gulf oil infrastructure disruptions.
